name: Optimuss Practice Sisal Kitten Scratching Pad Cat Toys Training Board Mat Home Protection Optimuss
description: Brand new and high quality | This scratching mat protects your furniture and carpets against your cat’s natural instinct to sharpen it’s claws. | Suitable for cats of all age. Sharpening the claws is rather important for cats so it is important to offer your cat scratching possibilities around the house. | Sisal is a natural fibre, which helps to care for the cat claws. | Durable and brings more fun to your cat. Can be nest cushion or sleeping pad for you pet cat. Nice gift for your lovely pet.
